description_long: This community center is a low-rise, modern structure set within a landscaped area featuring numerous mature trees and open spaces. The main building is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes with flat roofs, primarily finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco. A large outdoor swimming pool is centrally located, surrounded by paved walkways and adjacent to a smaller, darker-roofed auxiliary building, possibly for storage or utilities. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, with a driveway and parking area visible on one side. The grounds are well-organized, with clear separations between green spaces, paved areas, and built structures, suggesting a design focused on both community gathering and recreational activities. The overall layout is open and inviting, with multiple access points and a harmonious integration of built and natural elements.
description: A modern, low-rise community center with flat roofs, a central swimming pool, and landscaped grounds surrounded by trees and paved walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the community center from above, highlighting the pool, main building, auxiliary structure, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the main building's length, the pool, and the open green areas.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the property, with the perimeter wall, auxiliary building, and dense tree coverage most visible.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side angle, showing the driveway, parking area, and the relationship between the main building and the pool.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with flat roofs, clean lines, large windows, and a focus on integration with landscaped outdoor spaces.
